name: whetstone
description: An in-session writing coach that sharpens your draft without ever writing for you, with an honest provenance ledger and always-on local grammar.

commands.title: Pause or resume the provenance ledger

whetstone.activeProvider.description: The cloud model provider used for coaching inference (BYO key in SecretStorage). Anthropic is the validated reference provider; others are added once they pass the red-team gate.

whetstone.models.coaching.description: Optional override for the coaching model id. Leave empty to use the active provider's default coaching model.

whetstone.models.judge.description: Optional override for the guard-judge model id. Leave empty to use the active provider's default (cheap) judge model.

whetstone.ledger.storeInWorkspace.description: Store the provenance ledger inside the current workspace instead of the extension's global storage. Off by default so the ledger is not accidentally committed; opt in to have it travel with the repository.

whetstone.ledger.externalInsertThreshold.description: Minimum number of characters in a single insert to be recorded as a significant external-text insertion (paste-shaped change). Changes below this threshold are considered incremental typing. Recorded transparently — never asserts AI authorship.

whetstone.grammar.severity.description: Severity (quietness) of local grammar diagnostics. Tuned to a quiet 'hint' or 'info' marker rather than an alarming 'error'.

whetstone.telemetry.enabled.description: Opt-out, on-device telemetry (self-return, helpfulness, voice-preservation sampling). Aggregated locally; prose and keys never leave the device. Set to false to disable all collection.
